approval_rule_template_id.description: The unique identifier for the approval rule template.

content.description: The content of the approval rule template, detailing the approval conditions.

creation_date.description: The date and time when the approval rule template was created.

description.description: A brief summary or explanation of what the approval rule template is for.

id.description: The identifier for the approval rule template, often used in referencing.

last_modified_date.description: The date and time when the approval rule template was last modified.

last_modified_user.description: The user who last modified the approval rule template.

rule_content_sha256.description: The SHA256 hash of the rule content, used for integrity verification.
